title: Badge: Debt Smart
resultSuccessText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct! You're a true Debt Smart expert!
resultSuccessLesson: Lesson: Handle borrowing responsibly by planning repayment, borrowing only when necessary, communicating with lenders, and avoiding debt traps!
resultFailText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct. Practice makes perfect with responsible borrowing!
resultFailTip: Tip: Always plan repayment before borrowing, borrow only when necessary, communicate with lenders if you can't pay, and avoid unnecessary debt!

challenges.title: Borrowing for Education
challenges.question: You need money for education. What's the responsible approach?

challenges.title: Repayment Planning
challenges.question: You borrowed ₹1000. What should you do?

options.text: Borrow more to pay old debt
Create a repayment plan and stick to it

challenges.title: Borrowing for Wants
challenges.question: You want a new gadget but can't afford it. What should you do?

options.text: Save first or borrow only if you can repay

challenges.title: Communication with Lender
challenges.question: You can't repay on time. What's the best action?

challenges.title: Avoiding Debt Trap
challenges.question: How can you avoid falling into a debt trap?

options.text: Borrow only when necessary and always repay on time
